steps.title: Identify what must be emphasized
steps.content: The prompt requires emphasizing WHEN Judea Pearl won the award—the timing. The notes provide exactly one date: 2011.

steps.title: Find which choice emphasizes the timing
steps.content: Choice B is the only one that includes 2011 and structures the sentence to emphasize it—”It was in 2011 that...” puts the year at the front where it stands out. The other three all omit the date and thus cannot satisfy the prompt's requirement to emphasize timing. That matches choice B — B is correct.
